item.title:
RT @BinanceAcademy: Your AI trading co-pilot is here.

item.description:
RT @BinanceAcademy: Your AI trading co-pilot is here.
Binance Ai Pro can help you analyze markets, execute trades, monitor your portfolio,…

item.author: @binance
